Purpose: Make successful interception the main objective.
Tuning Notes: Keep large enough that shaping cannot beat capture.

Purpose: Dense learning signal for moving closer.
Tuning Notes: If agent oscillates, reduce; if it never learns early, increase slightly.
Avoid making this so strong that agent ignores safety.
If training becomes too negative early, reduce to -0.01.

Purpose: Reward actual relative motion that closes distance.
Tuning Notes: Great for interception; tune carefully if target evasive behavior changes.
Increase only after the agent can intercept.
Safe range defaults to z in [2, world_z - 2].
Crash should be as bad or worse than missing capture.
